series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains orders from a court, an attorney, or other authoritative entity that commands appearance and/or testimony in court, at hearing, or at deposition, or commands production of documents or other items.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: subpoenas that command appearance fulfilled. all other subpoenas and responsive records six (6) months from date of compliance. ; Electronic: subpoenas that command appearance fulfilled. all other subpoenas and responsive records six (6) months from date of compliance
